name: Ming lee
description: Ming is an average height, adult, Asian-Canadian woman with light skin, brown eyes, bright green eyeshadow, a mole under her left eye, and long black hair that is tied into a bun at the lower back. She wears a light blue and aquamarine, wrapped dress with a green blazer with gray buttons, dark gray tights, and dark green heels. She also has other accessories such as emerald earrings set in gold, an emerald ring, a red moon talisman (which is later replaced by a Tamagotchi), an maroon handbag, and sunglasses she wears whenever it's appropriate.
creator: Disvad123fox
